prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等社会热门专业该校均有招生且位次靠 前，持续吸引高分考生；本省2026年高考总人数约53.5万人，较2025年（约46.3万人）增加约15.5%，考生规模大幅增长，整体竞争加剧。\ n学校位于陕西省（非本省），在四川招生占比约2.3%（2025年），属跨省招生，无本省生源倾斜效应；地域偏好上，四川考生对西北地区高校报考意愿相对平稳。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次22824名、2026年扩招8.3%（缓解竞争）、本省考生大增约15.5%（加剧竞争）、软科排名持续上升（增强吸引力）等多重因素，扩招与考 生增加效应相互对冲后，考生规模增长对竞争的推升作用略占主导，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅后移；预测最低位次约23759名，区间23259–24259名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category (including Science) was approximately 20393 → 22193 → 18113 → 22824. In recent 4 years, the ranking fluctuated significantly. In 2024, due to a substantial increase in the provincial control line (Science first-tier line 539 points), the ranking moved forward to 18113. In 2025, due to the first year of the new college entrance examination (Physics Category undergraduate batch 438 points), the ranking moved backward to 22824. The 2025 baseline is approximately 22824. The university's enrollment plan in Sichuan for Physics Category was 99 in 2022, 173 in 2023, 172 in 2024, and 181 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend. The 2026 plan is 196, an increase of 15 (+8.3%) compared to 2025, with a significant expansion rate, theoretically easing competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university. The Soft Science main ranking has continuously risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, reflecting the university's enhanced comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher (negative evaluation), but in recent years, the reputation has been stable with no new major negative public opinion. Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (evaluation: average), with short video platform exposure at a medium-low level, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, 4 disciplines—Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science—were rated A-, all of which are agricultural and forestry characteristic disciplines. These directly correspond to the university's enrollment majors such as Agriculture (Agriculture Category), Plant Protection, Animal Science, and Grassland Science, providing some support for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Socially popular majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering are all offered by the university with high rankings, continuously attracting high-scoring candidates. The total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is approximately 535,000, an increase of about 15.5% compared to 2025 (about 463,000), leading to a significant increase in candidate scale and intensified overall competition. The university is located in Shaanxi Province (not the home province), with an enrollment proportion in Sichuan of about 2.3% (2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment without a home-province student bias effect. In terms of regional preference, Sichuan candidates have a relatively stable willingness to apply to universities in the northwest region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 22824, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 8.3% (easing competition), the significant increase of about 15.5% in provincial candidates (intensifying competition), and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the effects of enrollment expansion and candidate increase offset each other. However, the increase in candidate scale slightly dominates in driving up competition. It is predicted that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will slightly move backward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 23759, with a range of 23259–24259.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Computer Category (including Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Electronic Information Engineering
- Veterinary Medicine (Excellence Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering
- Mechanical Category (including Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Mechanical and Electronic Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Water Resources Category (Excellence Class)
- Economics Category (including Economics, Finance, International Economics and Trade)
- Biological Science Category (including Biological Science, Biotechnology, Bioengineering).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Business Administration Category (including Accounting, Business Administration, Agricultural and Forestry Economics and Management, Land Resource Management, Marketing)
- Landscape Architecture
- Horticulture (Horticulture Category)
- Grassland Science
- Aquaculture.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 23759, with a range of 23259–24259. If the ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main force, sprint for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 23000), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 popular majors such as Electrical Engineering and Automation and Computer Category. If the ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., outside 24000), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors to ensure admission.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2022 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 3390 → 3517 → 3150 → 3190, with small fluctuations over the past 4 years, oscillating narrowly within the 3100–3500 range; the 2025 baseline is about 3190; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Sichuan was 11 in 2022, 12 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 15 in 2025, showing a gradual small expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 14, a decrease of 1 (-6.7%) from 2025, marking the first reduction in recent years, theoretically intensifying competition slightly.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 76th in 2021 to 69th in 2026, with a stable improvement in recent years and enhanced comprehensive strength; during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was a negative incident of academic misconduct by a teacher (somewhat negative evaluation), but in recent years the reputation has been stable with no major new negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking is 75th (rated as average), with medium-low exposure; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Crop Science, Plant Protection, Animal Husbandry, and Grass Science were rated A-, all of which are agricultural and forestry characteristic disciplines; the History Category enrollment majors are mainly Law, Sociology, Public Administration, International Chinese Education, and English, with low correlation to the advantageous disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law is socially hot (recommended), Chinese Language/Literature is recommended as hot, Public Administration is divided in popularity and wait-and-see; the total number of candidates in the province for the 2026 college entrance examination is about 535,000, estimated at about 206,000 based on the History Category proportion of about 38.5%, an increase of about 15.7% compared to 2025 (about 178,000), with a significant increase in the number of candidates, intensifying overall competition; the university is located in Shaanxi Province (not the home province), with about 2.3% of enrollment in Sichuan (2025), which is cross-provincial enrollment, with no home province student preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 3190, a 6.7% enrollment reduction in 2026 (intensifying competition), a significant increase of about 15.7% in local candidates (intensifying competition), and the continuous rise in Soft Science ranking (enhancing attractiveness), the reduction in enrollment and increase in candidates jointly drive intensified competition. It is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025 (ranking number decreases); the predicted minimum ranking is about 3012, with a range of 2512–3512.
